# iDo Events — Melbourne Event Styling & Prop Hire

## Who We Are

iDo Events is a Melbourne-based event styling and prop hire business. We deliver, set up, and pack down event decorations across 30+ Melbourne suburbs. Founded and operated by a local family team, we have styled 200+ events since launching.

## Services

- **Wedding Styling** — Ceremony arches, reception table settings, floral installations, draping, and lighting
- **Birthday Decorations & Prop Hire** — Balloon garlands, themed backdrops, dessert tables for all ages (1st birthdays to milestone celebrations)
- **Engagement Party Styling** — Modern arches, neon signs, balloon installations, and elegant table settings
- **Baby Shower Styling** — Pastel balloon installations, custom backdrops, dessert table setups, gender reveal features
- **Bridal Shower & Hens Party Setup** — Elegant backdrops, grazing table setups, flower walls, personalised signage
- **Christening & Baptism Styling** — Traditional and modern christening setups with elegant backdrops and florals
- **Corporate Event Styling** — Product launches, gala dinners, conferences with branded prop installations
- **Mehndi & Nikkah Event Styling** — Vibrant stage setups, marigold installations, traditional draping for South Asian celebrations

## Service Area

Melbourne, Victoria, Australia. Key suburbs include: Point Cook, Tarneit, Truganina, Werribee, Hoppers Crossing, Craigieburn, Epping, Dandenong, Clayton, Glen Waverley, Doncaster, Preston, Brunswick, Footscray, Sunshine, Oakleigh, Coburg, Reservoir, Deer Park, Caroline Springs, Roxburgh Park, Thomastown, Lalor, Noble Park, and Keysborough.

## Pricing

- Birthday prop hire: from $350 (balloon garland + backdrop)
- Baby shower styling: from $350
- Bridal shower setup: from $400
- Engagement party styling: from $450
- Wedding ceremony-only: from $650
- Full wedding styling (ceremony + reception): from $1,800
- Mehndi night styling: from $1,200
- Corporate event styling: from $800

All prices include delivery, full setup, and pack-down. No hidden fees.

## What Makes Us Different

- Full-service: we deliver, set up, and pack down — clients do nothing
- Culturally informed: we style Pakistani, Indian, Afghan, Lebanese, Vietnamese, Greek, and Italian celebrations
- Local knowledge: we know Melbourne venues, parking constraints, loading docks, and setup protocols
- Props, not single-use: sustainable hire model means nothing goes to landfill
